title: Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-09
content:
# Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-09

## 1) Warm Lead Follow-up Script (Buyer/Seller)

**Text/DM opener**
"Hey [Name] — quick check-in: are you still aiming to [buy/sell] this spring, or has your timeline shifted? I can send a quick 2026 Vancouver snapshot so you can decide your next step clearly."

**If yes/active**
"Perfect — I can map your next 2–3 steps so you don’t lose momentum. Are you free for a 10-minute call [time option 1] or [time option 2]?"

**If unsure/stalled**
"Totally fair. Want me to send a simple one-page game plan based on your target area + budget so you can move when ready?"

## 2) Past Client Sphere Check-in (Referral + Reconnect)

"Hey [Name] — hope you’re doing well. Quick one: if a friend or family member asks you about buying/selling in Vancouver this year, I’m happy to be a zero-pressure resource for them. Also, if you want, I can send you a mini neighborhood value update this week."

## 3) Consumer-Facing Content Outline (Post today)

**Topic:** "3 mistakes Vancouver homeowners make before listing (and how to avoid them)"

- Mistake 1: Renovating the wrong rooms first
- Mistake 2: Pricing from emotion, not current micro-market comps
- Mistake 3: Waiting to prep marketing assets until after listing goes live

**CTA:** "Comment 'LIST' and I’ll send the pre-listing checklist I use with clients."

## 4) COI Outreach Note (Mortgage/Law/Inspection)

"Hey [Name] — I’m building a tighter Vancouver referral circle for buyers/sellers who need reliable support (mortgage, legal, inspection). Open to a quick coffee next week to compare what clients are struggling with most right now?"

## Daily minimums
- 8 warm lead follow-ups sent
- 5 past-client check-ins sent
- 1 consumer-facing post published
- 2 COI intros sent
